feedback.text: I think the Digital Fairness Act should include more protections for consumers of video games specifically. Issues such as publishers permanently rendering video games such as Ubisoft's The Crew unplayable despite consumers paying upwards of 60 for them and payment processors such as Visa and Mastercard dictating what content is allowed to be sold through sites such as Steam and Itch.io are concerns for me as an avid video game player. Thank you for your time and consideration.
